title: Tech stocks today: Nvidia's Jensen Huang kicks off GTC event, Nebius strikes deal with Meta
summary: Live coverage of "Magnificent Seven" stocks, and the latest technology news.

title: Nvidia launches Groq 3 AI chip and CPU server aimed at Intel during GTC 2026
summary: Nvidia on Monday unveiled its new Groq 3 processor and its effort to take on Intel in the CPU space during the chipmaker's GTC event.

title: AI companies continue cross-investment as ROI questions loom
summary: Bokeh Capital Partners founder and CIO Kimberly Forrest and Freedom Capital Markets managing director Paul Meeks share their thoughts on the trajectory of the AI trade, and at what point return on investment can be expected. This comes after Meta Platforms (META) has inked a $27 billion deal for an AI partnership with Nebius (NBIS).

title: Nvidia exec: Enterprise AI will grow as more companies invest in infrastructure
summary: Nvidia (NVDA) plans to kick off its GTC 2026 event (GPU Technology Conference) in San Jose on Monday, March 16. The event has been dubbed the "Super Bowl of AI" as investors anticipate major announcements and new projects from the chipmaking powerhouse. Nvidia senior director of HPC (High Performance Computing) and AI infrastructure, Dion Harris, spoke with Yahoo Finance about the growth of AI models as more companies invest heavily into data center infrastructure. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

title: When not to buy the dip on AI, software stocks: Strategist
summary: Laffer Tengler Investments CEO and CIO Nancy Tengler comes on Market Catalysts to share her perspective on AI and software stocks currently trading at a discount as investors "return to [the] fundamentals." To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

title: Ethereum Has Serious Momentum, Up More than 12% Today. Here's Why That Trend Could Continue.
summary: A big move in the world's second-largest cryptocurrency has many investors ratcheting up their bets.

title: Nvidia Doubles AI Hardware Forecast, Touts New Inferencing Chip
summary: Nvidia raised its forecast for AI computing hardware demand and announced a specialized processor for AI inferencing. Nvidia stock rose.

title: Audience Unlimited Could Be The Trade Desk's Next Strategic Test
summary: The Trade Desk continues to evolve as digital advertising grows more competitive.

title: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Rallies As Oil Prices Tumble; Micron, Nvidia Are Key Movers
summary: Dow Jones Futures: The stock market rallied Monday as oil prices dived. Karman, Micron and Nvidia were big movers.

title: Schneider Outlines Roadmap for Vera Rubin Chip Cooling
summary: Schneider Electric, a global energy technology company, announced Monday, alongside Nvidia, a roadmap for cooling the latest generation of Nvidia chips.  With increased speed, however, comes increased power and cooling requirements.  Schneider’s “reference design” for Rubin racks makes it easier to build and operate AI data centers, key for any entity spending billions on AI infrastructure.
